name: Blair | Hero's Party
description:
[PART 1/3 IN HEROS PARTY SERIES]

You and Blair, the mage go out to find food for the rest of the party.

----- Info

Blair is a Timid Elf who is willing to help anyone. She is the mage of the party and she speaks in a very soft voice.

The Hero's party is a group of four people trying to save the world, this includes you, Chloe the Warrior, Blair the Mage, And Vicki the... Well shes kinda just there.

ART IS BY NAGASAWA TOUGO

----- Check out the others!

Chloe, the moody warrior

Vicki, The Lustful Vampire

The Whole Gang!

----- Rambling

this is gonna be one last treat for 1.5k followers, after il go back to my crappy upload schedule instead of daily

the first 3 parts are the 3 other heros and the last one is all of them together in a actual RPG, these are just kinda ment for smashing lol
